name: Lake Geneva Boat Cruise
description: Scenic boat cruise on Lake Geneva passing vineyards, castles, and the stunning Alpine backdrop.
longDescription: Cruise the crystal-clear waters of Lake Geneva aboard a historic Belle Époque paddle steamer or modern vessel. Pass the UNESCO-listed Lavaux vineyards, the iconic Jet d'Eau, Château de Chillon, and charming lakeside towns. Choose from short 1-hour cruises to full-day excursions. The lake offers stunning views of the French Alps and Mont Blanc on clear days.

providers.name: CGN (Compagnie Générale de Navigation)
providers.description: Official lake cruise operator with historic paddle steamers

providers.name: Swiss Boat Tours
providers.description: Premium sunset cruise with aperitif included

providers.name: SwissActivities
providers.description: Switzerland's biggest activities marketplace — verified suppliers, free cancellation
